generatedResponsibilities: style the review shell clearly and readably
support the embedded SVG without altering its trust meaning
keep the layout restrained and deterministic
forbiddenResponsibilities: decorative emphasis that changes trust interpretation
layout drift that hides the graph
status color meanings that contradict receipts
equivalenceRules: CSS must not change the proof graph content.
CSS colors for passed and blocked states must align with the SVG and review summary.
CSS must not introduce a new visual metaphor.
completionPosture: CSS is a styling projection, not a claim surface.
